items.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
items.description: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.

items.title: Trump's annual financial disclosure shows more than $580M in crypto-related income
items.description: Trump's 927-page financial disclosure report for 2025 totals more than 900 pages detailing holdings in cryptocurrency and stocks.

items.title: Trump says Council of Economic Advisers head Pierre Yared is leaving
items.description: The Council of Economic Advisers has provided the president with information and advice on both domestic and international economic policy since 1946.

items.title: Record chip rally adds $2 trillion in combined value to Micron, Intel and AMD in second quarter
items.description: Wall Street poured into chipmakers not named Nvidia in the second quarter, as the artificial intelligence boom expanded to include more suppliers.

items.title: Social Security gender gap means women receive about $4,800 less in annual benefits. What to know before claiming
items.description: Women tend to earn less and spend more time outside of the workforce, which may reduce their Social Security benefits. Here's what to consider before claiming.

items.title: Nike results top estimates even as China sales drop 12%; retailer expects $986 million tariff refund
items.description: Nike was expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.

items.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.description: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

items.title: Anthropic launches AI drug discovery program, joining tech giants in betting on healthcare
items.description: Anthropic will start an internal drug discovery program, part of a new push to sell artificial intelligence tools to drugmakers.

items.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike both have best quarter ever as AI threats bolster cyber demand
items.description: The cybersecurity leaders are leaning into identity security, a critical cyber segment, as AI agents outnumber humans

items.title: Brent posts biggest monthly decline since March 2020 as traders monitor U.S.-Iran talks
items.description: The moves come as oil traders monitor the prospect for U.S.-Iran talks in Doha on Tuesday.

items.title: FDA lets Philip Morris market Zyn nicotine pouches as less harmful than cigarettes
items.description: The Trump administration has expanded access to nicotine products despite concerns from public health critics about youth use and addiction.

items.title: AeroVironment skyrockets 19% as dronemaker capitalizes on defense spending surge
items.description: AeroVironment is benefiting from U.S. plans to modernize the U.S. military and secure space.

items.title: Blue Origin pivots to redesigned launchpad after explosion in push to fly by end of 2026
items.description: Blue Origin won't be "rebuilding the same pad," and will instead adopt a configuration that was in development for a larger variant of its New Glenn rocket.

items.title: Private equity in youth sports draws bipartisan scrutiny in Congress
items.description: Democratic and Republican members of Congress expressed alarm at the trend of private equity investment in youth sports.

items.title: Wall Street says sell Goldman, buy Capital One. Here's where we stand
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: Big egg producers settle price inflation probe with DOJ for 53 million eggs — and $3.3M
items.description: Cal-Maine Foods, Versova and Hickman's Egg Ranch agreed to settle allegations of price manipulation by the Department of Justice and 17 states.

items.title: AWS puts $1 billion into new AI unit to embed engineers with customers, joining growing wave
items.description: AWS FDEs will look to leave behind self-sufficient teams with new AI solutions and capabilities in a matter of weeks, the company said.

items.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
items.description: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.

items.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
items.description: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies.

items.title: American Airlines brings grab-and-go lounge to New York's JFK
items.description: American Airlines is opening a grab-and-go lounge at New York's JFK
